data.content: Implementation review REJECTED: work/foolery-df3a only converts 3 of 8 views to use aliases (relationship-picker, wave-planner, waves/route). Five views still use raw shortId: beat-columns.tsx, beat-detail-lightbox.tsx, dep-tree.tsx, retakes-view.tsx, cascade-close-dialog.tsx. A separate feat/df3a-alias-in-views branch has changes for those views but was never merged into the work branch. The displayBeatLabel() utility in beat-display.ts is well-designed and tests pass. Next step: incorporate the missing 5 views into the work branch, either by cherry-picking from feat/df3a-alias-in-views or re-implementing with displayBeatLabel().
